note: Never report pass by default; mark pass only when verified by evidence.

criteria.description: Exactly one playbook loaded; topic matches the artifact actually produced.
criteria.pass_when: one route resolved and Read; no cluster load

criteria.description: Format/brand disambiguation picked the right enum (HTML family, xlsx binary vs spec, slides, folio).
criteria.pass_when: disambiguating signal recorded; rejected candidates named

criteria.description: DS tokens applied from resolved config; no hardcoded brand values outside :root/token files.
criteria.pass_when: every consumer references var()/mapped style; inherited keys tagged [SUPUESTO]

criteria.description: Exactly one brand in the output; no off-brand elements.
criteria.pass_when: brand identified before generation; mix flagged and refused

criteria.description: No runtime clock, remote fetch, or randomness; same inputs reproduce byte-stable output.
criteria.pass_when: artifact_date caller-supplied; folio year from issue-date field

criteria.description: Artifact generated via the playbook's deterministic script, not hand-edited.
criteria.pass_when: script invoked; tracker/state mutated only via --apply

criteria.description: Playbook's authoritative checklist passes (landmarks/@media/favicon/WCAG or OOXML validity or folio uniqueness).
criteria.pass_when: check.sh or compiler exits clean over valid+invalid fixtures

criteria.description: Evidence tags on non-obvious claims, single Alfa family; no invented prices; no client PII.
criteria.pass_when: Constitution v6.0.0 honored; tags not mixed across families
